prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组最低位次约2055→1663→1571→1410→3838，2021–2024年呈持续前移趋势（位次数字减小，竞争加剧），但2025年因河南省首次实行新高考（物理类/历史类），物理类含两个专业组，其中901组（理学与材料菁英班、智能制造与智能车辆菁英班）最低位次为3838，较2024年理科组1410明显后移，主要受专业组划分影响；2025年基准位次取3838；该校在河南省理科组招生计划2021年69人、2022年74人、2023年74人、2024年48人、2025年133人（物理类），2026年物理类计划174人，较2025年扩招约30.8%，扩招幅度较大，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京理工大学为985、211、双一流高校，软科中国大学排名2026年第14名（2025年第13名），稳居全国Top20，属顶尖理工类高校，国防七子之一；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，涉及师德师风事件（宫琳被开除党籍、伍俊英被指控侵犯学生隐私等），但学校舆情应对较为迅速；抖音热度排名第47位（较热），短视频曝光量中等偏上，整体关注度正常；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共12个学科：信息与通信工程A+、控制科学与工程A+、光学工程A、机械工程A、材料科学与工程A、管理科学与工程A、计算机科学与技术A、力学A-、化学工程与技术A-、工商管理A-、数学A-、物理学A-，学科实力雄厚，对考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等北理工优势相关专业大类持续高热推荐；河南省2026年考生总数约120万（不确定），较2025年物理类55.5万+历史类35.2万≈90.7万大幅增加，竞争加剧；北京理工大学位于北京市，属一线城市，对河南考生有较强吸引力；该校在河南招生规模较大（2026年物理类174人+历史类30人=204人），属外省985在豫招生较多的院校之一。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年物理类901组最低位次3838的基准、2026年扩招约30.8%的缓解效应、河南省考生总数大幅增加的竞争压力以及学校顶尖层次（软科第14名）的持续吸引力，扩招与考生增加基本对冲。预测2026年物理类最低位次约4548名，波动区间4048–5048名。

- 工科试验班（信息科学技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:

- 工科试验班（航空航天与机电类）
- 工科试验班（智能制造与智能车辆菁英班）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间4048–5048名内，建议以二档（电子信息实验班、航空航天与机电类）为主力填报，一档（卓越班/未来精工技术/徐特立英才班）可冲刺，三档（理学与材料菁英班）保底。位次明显优于区间下限（4048以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。北理工以工科试验班大类招生，入校后专业分流，建议优先选择信息科学技术、电子信息实验班等热门方向。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the science group was approximately 2055 → 1663 → 1571 → 1410 → 3838. From 2021 to 2024, there was a continuous forward trend (ranking numbers decreased, competition intensified). However, in 2025, due to Henan Province's first implementation of the new college entrance examination (Physics Category/History Category), the Physics Category includes two major groups. Among them, Group 901 (Elite Class in Science and Materials, Elite Class in Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Vehicles) had a minimum ranking of 3838, which is significantly lower than the 2024 science group's 1410, mainly affected by the division of major groups. The baseline ranking for 2025 is 3838. The university's enrollment plan for the science group in Henan Province was 69 in 2021, 74 in 2022, 74 in 2023, 48 in 2024, and 133 (Physics Category) in 2025. The 2026 Physics Category plan is 174, an increase of about 30.8% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and will somewhat alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Institute of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 14th (13th in 2025), firmly in the national Top 20. It is a top-tier science and engineering university and one of the Seven Sons of National Defense. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents of teacher ethics (Gong Lin expelled from the Party, Wu Junying accused of violating student privacy, etc.), but the university's public relations response has been relatively quick. Its Douyin popularity ranks 47th (relatively hot), with medium-to-high short video exposure, and overall attention is normal. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 12 disciplines rated A- or above: Information and Communication Engineering A+, Control Science and Engineering A+, Optical Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A, Materials Science and Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Computer Science and Technology A, Mechanics A-, Chemical Engineering and Technology A-, Business Administration A-, Mathematics A-, Physics A-. The university has strong disciplinary strength, which strongly attracts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other advantageous related major categories at Beijing Institute of Technology continue to be highly recommended. In 2026, the total number of candidates in Henan Province is about 1.2 million (uncertain), a significant increase from the 2025 Physics Category of 555,000 plus History Category of 352,000, totaling about 907,000, intensifying competition. Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, a first-tier city, which strongly attracts Henan candidates. The university has a relatively large enrollment scale in Henan (2026 Physics Category 174 + History Category 30 = 204), making it one of the more numerous out-of-province 985 universities enrolling in Henan.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline minimum ranking of 3838 for the 2025 Physics Category Group 901, the mitigating effect of the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 30.8%, the competitive pressure from the significant increase in the total number of candidates in Henan Province, and the sustained attraction of the university's top-tier level (14th in Soft Science), the expansion and the increase in candidates roughly offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for the 2026 Physics Category will be approximately 4548, with a fluctuation range of 4048 to 5048.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellent Class/Future Precision Engineering Technology/Xu Teli Elite Class/Top-Notch Plan)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Information Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Mechanical-Electrical Category)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Vehicle Elite Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Science and Materials Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Vehicle Elite Class) (Sino-Foreign Cooperation/Higher Tuition Group).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4048–5048, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 (Electronic Information Experimental Class, Aerospace and Mechanical-Electrical Category), with Tier 1 (Excellent Class/Future Precision Engineering Technology/Xu Teli Elite Class) as a reach, and Tier 3 (Science and Materials Elite Class) as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 4048), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors. Beijing Institute of Technology recruits through broad engineering experimental class categories, with major selection after enrollment. It is recommended to prioritize popular directions such as Information Science and Technology and Electronic Information Experimental Class.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年文科组最低位次约1351→1051→989→916→874，连续5年持续前移（位次数字减小），累计前移约477名，竞争逐年加剧；2025年历史类基准位次约874名；该校在河南省文科组招生计划2021年10人、2022年11人、2023年11人、2024年20人、2025年23人（历史类），2026年历史类计划30人，较2025年扩招约30.4%，扩招幅度较大。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流，软科2026年第14名，属顶尖高校，对文科考生同样具有强吸引力；2026年声誉偏负面（师德师风事件），但学校处理迅速；抖音热度较热（第47名），整体关注度正常；工商管理A-、管理科学与工程A等管理类学科实力突出，与文科招生专业（社会科学试验班）高度相关。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学、汉语言/中文等文科相关专业热度偏热至分化观望；河南省2026年考生总数约120万，较2025年大幅增加，竞争加剧；北京位于一线城市，对河南文科考生吸引力强；2026年历史类计划30人，较2025年扩招7人。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年历史类最低位次874的基准、2026年扩招约30.4%的缓解效应以及河南省考生总数大幅增加的竞争压力，扩招与考生增加基本对冲。预测2026年历史类最低位次约1034名，波动区间916–1152名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 社会科学试验班（管理与经济方向）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 文科组仅设社会科学试验班两个方向（管理与经济方向、人文社科方向），2025年两个方向最低位次均为874名。位次在预测区间916–1152名内均有希望录取。建议优先填报管理与经济方向（含工商管理、经济学等），人文社科方向（含法学、社会工作、外语等）作为备选。北理工文科招生人数较少（2026年30人），竞争仍较激烈。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for the liberal arts group was approximately 1351 → 1051 → 989 → 916 → 874, moving forward continuously for 5 consecutive years (ranking number decreasing), with a cumulative forward movement of about 477 places, indicating intensifying competition year by year; the baseline ranking for the History Category in 2025 is approximately 874; the university's enrollment plan for the liberal arts group in Henan Province was 10 in 2021, 11 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 20 in 2024, and 23 in 2025 (History Category), and the 2026 History Category plan is 30, an increase of about 30.4% compared to 2025, a relatively large expansion.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class, ranked 14th in the 2026 Soft Science rankings, a top-tier university, also strongly attractive to liberal arts candidates; the reputation in 2026 is slightly negative (teacher ethics incident), but the university handled it quickly; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (47th place), overall attention is normal; Business Administration A-, Management Science and Engineering A and other management disciplines have outstanding strength, highly relevant to the liberal arts enrollment majors (Social Science Experimental Class).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts-related majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature are trending from hot to differentiated and wait-and-see; the total number of candidates in Henan Province in 2026 is about 1.2 million, a significant increase compared to 2025, intensifying competition; Beijing, as a first-tier city, has strong appeal to Henan liberal arts candidates; the 2026 History Category plan is 30, an increase of 7 compared to 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline minimum ranking of 874 for the History Category in 2025, the mitigating effect of an approximately 30.4% enrollment expansion in 2026, and the competitive pressure from a significant increase in the total number of candidates in Henan Province, the expansion and the increase in candidates roughly offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for the History Category in 2026 will be approximately 1034, with a fluctuation range of 916–1152.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Management and Economics Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Humanities and Social Sciences Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- None currently (only two major directions in liberal arts, both under the Social Science Experimental Class category, with the same admission ranking).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The liberal arts group only has two directions under the Social Science Experimental Class (Management and Economics Direction, Humanities and Social Sciences Direction), and the minimum ranking for both directions in 2025 was 874. Candidates with rankings within the predicted range of 916–1152 have a chance of admission. It is recommended to prioritize the Management and Economics Direction (including Business Administration, Economics, etc.), with the Humanities and Social Sciences Direction (including Law, Social Work, Foreign Languages, etc.) as a backup. The number of liberal arts students enrolled at Beijing Institute of Technology is relatively small (30 in 2026), so competition remains intense.
